title: The Official Fem Kaworu Thread
wikitext:
[]: The Official Fem-Kaworu Thread             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 07, 2007 1:03 pm Thread title was "Thread of Female Kaworu Theory anywhere?"; changed it to better reflect its current status. --Reichu Is there a theard on the female Kaworu theory anywhere either in here or Discussion? I thought I stumbled across it once, but now I can't find it. :( And if there's not a theard about it, one should be made. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Jan 07, 2007 1:32 pm Female Kaworu? I am not going to listen to reason. Kaworu + female = no. No excuses.

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Sun Jan 07, 2007 1:50 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: Female Kaworu? I am not going to listen to reason. Kaworu + female = no. No excuses.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:01 pm ...the fuck? Maybe the female thing is only applicable to giant WTF beings that are inherantly female anyway? Either way, Kaworu is dead, and that was probably just Lillith fucking around or something...?

[]:             Quote Post by zephyr72 » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:02 pm thats edited

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:04 pm ...it's gotta be.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:07 pm You lack both imagination and sense of humor. For teh shame!

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:09 pm Yeah, I get it now. <_<

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:32 pm I suspect that most of the F-K discussion is on ANF threads from about a year ago. In a nutshell, the suggestion is that Kaworu (the embodient of the feminine soul of the Mother of Angels) is built like an Eva (wide shouldered, DFC female); so is sent out into the world as a reverse-trap.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:34 pm Anyone who proposes that theory seriously needs to be punched in his or her reproductive organs repeteadly.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:36 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Anyone who proposes that theory seriously needs to be punched in his or her reproductive organs repeteadly.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:53 pm Oh yeah, well if you want to punch Reichu, you have to get through me first! /over-dramatics. Why did asking about a simple request cause some much contersory? Mou! Anyway, it's basically like this: Kaworu=Adam's soul. Adam=Female, so Kaworu=female I just wanted to know if there was any series evidence for this...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:55 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Anyone who proposes that theory seriously needs to be punched in his or her reproductive organs repeteadly.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:56 pm If you go by what MaggotMaster says, Adam and co are all genderless beings due to being funky mysterious creatures we know almost nothing about.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jan 07, 2007 2:58 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I just wanted to know if there was any series evidence for this...

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Jan 07, 2007 3:01 pm KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN KAWORU-KUN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN SHOUNEN Unless I'm hearing wrong I'm sure I heard that a lot in Episode 24.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 07, 2007 3:21 pm Everybody's forgotten about the fem-Kaworu thread already? Aw, shucks. The sorts of volatile reactions the idea gets are always amusing. MaggotMaster wrote: Anyone who proposes that theory seriously needs to be punched in his or her reproductive organs repeteadly.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Jan 07, 2007 3:24 pm Reichu wrote: And remember: EVAS ARE ROBOTS. EVAS ARE ROBOTS. EVAS ARE ROBOTS. EVAS ARE ROBOTS. EVAS ARE ROBOTS. EVAS ARE ROBOTS. EVAS ARE ROBOTS. EVAS ARE ROBOTS. EVAS ARE ROBOTS. EVAS ARE ROBOTS.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 07, 2007 3:29 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Ritsuko calls EVA01 an Artificial Human in EP1.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Jan 07, 2007 3:32 pm Wait, Reichu... you still seriously propose this theory? I thought it was sort of one of those of your "revelations" type things... Also, Sailor Star Dust: your signature still says your Avatar is "Ne, Shinji... shiyo ka? :twisted: " ...you'll have to explain this one to me. XD Oh yes, one more thing. How did that thing about Kaworu having vaginas in his palms come up? If I had to guess, I'd say it's because his palms are never shown in the episode (though I've never watched it with that in mind to check) and Lilith's palms opened into vaginas while absorbing the souls?

Article: The Official Fem Kaworu Thread
 the F-K discussion is on ANF threads from about a year ago. In a nutshell, the suggestion is that Kaworu (the embodient of the feminine soul of the Mother of Angels) is built like an Eva (wide shouldered, DFC female); so is sent out into the world as a reverse-trap.
